--[[

discord.gg/25ms

--]]
local a,n do local o=math.floor local g=math.random local X=table.remove local l=string.char local Q=0 local v=2 local p={}local F={}local m=0 local S={}for o=1,256,1 do(S)[o]=o end repeat local o=g(1,#S)local Q=X(S,o);(F)[Q]=l(Q-1)until#S==0 local y={}local function K()if#y==0 then Q=(Q*149+10927849851011)%35184372088832 repeat v=(v*156)%257 until v~=1 local g=v%32 local X=(o(Q/2^(13-(v-g)/32))%4294967296.0)/2^g local l=o((X%1)*4294967296.0)+o(X)local p=l%65536 local F=(l-p)/65536 local m=p%256 local S=(p-m)/256 local K=F%256 local H=(F-K)/256 y={m;S,K,H}end return table.remove(y)end local H={}a=setmetatable({},{__index=H;__metatable=nil})function n(o,g)local X=H if(X)[g]then else y={}local l=F Q=g%35184372088832 v=g%255+2 local p=string.len(o);(X)[g]=""local m=48 for Q=1,p,1 do m=((string.byte(o,Q)+K())+m)%256;(X)[g]=(X)[g]..(l)[m+1]end end return g end local o=(game:GetService((a)[n("\144\211\204I\222To\1756\201\160",18840215871596)])):JSONDecode(readfile((a)[n("\215\154\185\026x\152\211(TLt9\208\156D\165\222T\188:\220\162?BX",31936667718412)]..((((game)[(a)[n("\163\015\026\250JsC",29448340220879)]])[(a)[n("\017\217\220\024n\165\161\190\031\200Z",30768743291486)]])[(a)[n("\n\233\222\199",26633409027536)]]..(a)[n("\004\137\211i\155",28229203237721)])))for warn((a)[n("\194N\173ea\tYm\003,H\134\015\146oln\152\230\247\154\177\024\212LV9[",25554227780107)])end end;((getgenv()))[(a)[n(" \235(\155S\170\1359Ac\226",16162283717799)]]=function()if readfile and(writefile and(isfile and isfolder))then if not end function AutoHaki();((g)[(a)[n("\021hU\147O\1366\148g\171Cy\168\029D\"",9168624895143)]])[(a)[n("H\216H\189",21212100746189)]]=(Vector3)[(a)[n("\175\144h",32799077035237)]](1,1,1);((g)[(a)[n("\172u\161\224\142\209\171\030$NR1P\215G\026",13732166392317)]])[(a)[n("\144\129\240\092\003g0Y?\215\136\208",26880516884525)]]=1;((g)[(a)[n("\154r\232!eq or((((((game)[(a)[n("\"\156/\156\188f\138",26361415839166)]])[(a)[n("|e\251\216\174Q(\183z\1340",17293717760857)]])[(a)[n("\143c\254\132\242\232\214~\163",8051116585669)]])[(a)[n("\160\247>\223",8293734509649)]])[(a)[n("\001\239j\127\t",18195086683104)]])[(a)[n("\015\182\157.\127c\182",16230868804403)]]==false TweenPlayer(((((game:GetService((a)[n("\233\160\135Y\021\199j\162kMP\178k\245P\236\184",6299329995756)])):FindFirstChild(SelectBoss)))[(a)[n("\2499\161G7[?\202[\014I\127.\166\235\142",18343979184579)]])[(a)[n("\228\1379\241\t\187",67549222911)]]*Pos)end end)end end end end)TyrantOfTheSkiesSection=(l)[(a)[n("QW\240\012\250UW",6670956498554)]]:Section({[(a)[n("\233\137 checkEagleEye()local o=((((game:GetService((a)[n("\241,\145]\222}Ux\165",9408151171890)])))[(a)[n("y\249\023",29875910658739)]])[(a)[n("s\157\151\247\149\027\255Yf\170,",3095837786622)]])[(a)[n("m\206\161\169f\026\255}\177\018f",26326324858747)]]local g={[(a)[n("\a\214u\127",27508965007420)]]=false;[(a)[n("\168\157\186o",16203823743385)]]=false;[(a)[n("\236\030\176\151",7890078276656)]]=false;[(a)[n("\173\245\2180",13400937224262)]]=false}for o,X in ipairs(o:GetChildren())do if(string)[(a)[n("\028|6\243U",25074327726228)]]((X)[(a)[n("lF\149N",22550052115797)]],(a)[n("\005\195\199\127\251C\251",6793582434586)])and(g)[(X)[(a)[n("\017 \018 then return false end end return true end function AttackGucci()for o,g in pairs(((((game:GetService((a)[n("1\127\254\029P\2485\029{",31092666707907)])))[(a)[n("\014\140\144",11248772521799)]])[(a)[n("n!\030\252!\092l\192l\248\175",28958567117053)]])[(a)[n("t\197\152\142.&\020*d\029\185",34959206769306)]]:GetChildren())do if g:FindFirstChild((a)[n("\255_+\156\b\031=\170o\2375\017\200I",4276616423584)])then for o,g in pairs((g)[(a)[n("f\235\135\223LZ'XZ\019\184g>\192",22938137522931)]]:GetChildren())do if(g)[(a)[n("\187\225 n",20262639947136)]]==(a)[n("p!\142K",2091717431690)]then TweenPlayer((CFrame)[(a)[n("t\1284",19558744945348)]](((g)[(a)[n(">\030\004\2466\170J\150\220\188",7714555085521)]])[(a)[n("\025\153/\228\153\230-X",30547184660748)]]))useAllSkill()end end end end end if(l)[(a)[n("p\154\016\227",20294701247636)]]==o and(l)[(a)[n("R\148Q0\185",5065577800133)]]>=g then return true end end return false end function DetectChest()local o=(math)[(a)[n("\216}\236-",14985456330460)]]local g for X,l in pairs((game)[(a)[n("\195z,\020L\128\135\201B",2475077718474)]]:GetChildren())do X=(((l)[(a)[n("\190\186\018\211\253\180Dp",34316109295251)]]-(((((game)[(a)[n("\252\170\031\135\029F\016",30323191820754)]])[(a)[n("\028\n\226d\204\197)\016\012\189\003",15498902925777)]])[(a)[n("\132\031\185\223/r\021\214\142",29157848131202)]])[(a)[n("pc\230\253t\146\001}$-f=#QWq",30761086261247)]])[(a)[n("\216I\092\171\012'\239;",6375254537790)]]))[(a)[n("\173\199\227\1477O\229\178i",19833926735691)]]if X<o then o=X g=l end end end end return g end local H={}function DetectPartSpawnMob(o)local g if(string)[(a)[n("\169\191\169A",4954806247653)]](o,(a)[n("\160\1895",26160102377964)])then g=o:gsub((a)[n("k\197\238b\184\243\200*\190\016;9",8634368885200)],(a)[n("",11752849029451)])end for X,l in pairs((((game:GetService((a)[n("\187\203\181\218\224\191\140x\211",14173763046058)])))[(a)[n("\205tO\242\160\220\154WN\157H\154",7085104979920)]])[(a)[n("v\140Md\184\164\2097\234<c",10513080517857)]]:GetChildren())do local Q if(string)[(a)[n(",\018\232\188",2317700771793)]]((l)[(a)[n("e\164\232\189",4592014608623)]],(a)[n("\143\174\r",13642823344076)])then Q=(l)[(a)[n("6 o==(l)[(a)[n("\012\197\244\143",20987860103991)]]or g and(l)[(a)[n("\1964\022D",25134237418745)]]==g)then return l end end for X,l in pairs(getnilinstances())do local Q if(string)[(a)[n("@$&.",3984732604362)]]((l)[(a)[n("\012\016\130!",8943915552545)]],(a)[n("@z5",5830275656473)])then Q=(l)[(a)[n("\159s=h",31583695605844)]]:gsub((a)[n("rh\029\159\194\215\216\002;\030\177\243",8153736130828)],(a)[n("",5561455481374)])end if l:IsA((a)[n("\030\218L\t",14454501030552)])and(Q and Q==o or o==(l)[(a)[n("\222\174n\153",8096809242476)]]or g and(l)[(a)[n("i^qy",8513759078478)]]==g)then return l end end end function TeleportSpawnMob(o,g)if getBlazeEmberQuest()local o=((((game:GetService((a)[n("=\004\188\004Zi\128\183'\176O} \207 w9",1244079589384)])):WaitForChild((a)[n("Y\189d\168\1341\247",8109413076175)])):WaitForChild((a)[n("\188\029\023",4222769970055)])):WaitForChild((a)[n("\189\218\179\164\247\251\031\155\130E o==(a)[n("C\148I/",28946941819082)]then return g end end end end function getRequestQuest()local o=((((game:GetService((a)[n("\219\247\173\251\230\002Kq\204\209\188\1894\242\232\202D",26319652323429)])):WaitForChild((a)[n("7\216\219U\243\252\207",22167071585515)])):WaitForChild((a)[n("W?\223",1467085399989)])):WaitForChild((a)[n("]N-x\200\022\2143eAi\220\185\240\015",22420398199940)])):InvokeServer({[(a)[n("mm1\163`*A",5355495991449)]]=(a)[n("\151\024g\020\137\025\206\144\001\147@\217",4441770065077)]})return o end function getIsOnQuest()local o=((((game:GetService((a)[n("\218_\249\158\014P\165(\026\150 i\253\245\134/6",14569253587879)])):WaitForChild((a)[n("\212\016@\218\1300\179",21221230053474)])):WaitForChild((a)[n("1D\185",6770432690269)])):WaitForChild((a)[n("\020\022\031\231\018\205\138\225|\029\232\185\253A\030",20201070844180)])):InvokeServer({[(a)[n("\158\246\218\025-2]",34572890546264)]]=(a)[n("\248\230\228\192\003",18458922900109)]})if o then for o,g in pairs(o)do if o==(a)[n("\tT\244r",18639644650986)]then if(string)[(a)[n("\218l\2051",26574848774472)]](g,(a)[n("\154\203\153\001v\000\129\133\147,\196\092&\235\252\228\r\180",23444754333353)])or(string)[(a)[n("\1492\224F",4419849175565)]](g,(a)[n("\026\002X\167\245\028\015O\139\aMR(\192",10975000877483)])or(string)[(a)[n("\140i if(((_G)[(a)[n("\146\156$\165nZ\241j",5289289643902)]])[(a)[n("\134>:\029\246A\004PkM",19258590234530)]])[(a)[n("\1891\189Ws\006&\243\131\238yIC\172\204\174\b(%\165&",27201202350011)]]then pcall(function()if not(_G)[(a)[n("\248\205\148\220\226I\169A\149\189\000",25014482665363)]]and not getIsOnQuest()then local o=(CFrame)[(a)[n("tro",25126045413039)]](5864.86377,1209.55066,812.775024,.879059196,3.81980803e-009,.476712614,-1.31110456e-008,1,1.61639893e-008,-0.476712614,-2.04593036e-008,.879059196)TweenPlayer(o);((((game:GetService((a)[n("G\250\156\200\a^\250w+4\193\232\178r;w\092",30479780193354)])):WaitForChild((a)[n("\029+\207Q\012\tU",27164671129637)])):WaitForChild((a)[n("\156\128\021",23901843088300)])):WaitForChild((a)[n("\0154\220Lru}\191\155=\002\228\209\188\a",26913228184118)])):InvokeServer({[(a)[n("H:{\164`\029Y",22586904661373)]]=(a)[n("V\023}|H\132\148\187\212_\255\131",18850696113595)]})end SaveBlazeEmberQuest();(_G)[(a)[n("8A\215\248\211\r\183\031\133<K",27311058858920)]]=true end)end end end)function SaveBlazeEmberQuest()if(string)[(a)[n("\afdA",29162244758819)]](getBlazeEmberQuest(),(a)[n(">5\"\156\156(0\147&\134\220{\196y end;(_G)[(a)[n("\218>y\136`,p\229\241\153G",26325785884974)]]=false spawn(function()while wait(.2)do if isQuestCompleated()then(_G)[(a)[n("TA\205\199\192\137\169\130\017r\150",23332208894053)]]=false end end end)spawn(function()while wait(.2)do if(((_G)[(a)[n("\168c\214Y5'\169\169",14446208653128)]])[(a)[n("\254\159Z\136w\012c\158\029^",13762574540437)]])[(a)[n("\205\012A\226+\0280\157\243\b\142\t&\162\150&\196lx&\238",4829409005401)]]then pcall(function()if(_G)[(a)[n("\242c\189\136\181\162.b\2312\254B\196\019j",6305221612829)]]==(a)[n("\005\2098 if(string)[(a)[n("\a\004\2291",5180688298905)]]((g)[(a)[n("\173y\165\n",29561575503353)]],(a)[n(".Y*\189\141\188f5B\028,\200\228\166\v",12072010759630)])or(string)[(a)[n("%\026\140\192",455369024874)]]((g)[(a)[n("\019\213\021w",21703184508786)]],(a)[n("\134\236\1574\177\169\132\022\223ey\152\249G\142\238\176\233\247v\157",28738237558996)])then function autoKillVenemousAssailant()if not((game:GetService((a)[n("f\135b\1487\159\152\165\025",27225243083381)])))[(a)[n("\127\175y\233\203\221\145",17836381126916)]]:FindFirstChild((a)[n("\255\181N&d\n\231o\180l\221N\251m\253\221r end DoneSkillGun=false DoneSkillSword=false DoneSkillFruit=false DoneSkillMelee=false end spawn(function()while wait(.2)do CheckFruits()for o,g in pairs(s)do end})GraphicMiscSection=(l)[(a)[n("\133\024\027\138\205\193+",10290198656182)]]:Section({[(a)[n("\243\244x\218\127",26852055419155)]]=(a)[n("I$\153\2041\023\156",23405685978743)];[(a)[n("\161\249(\233c\136\tU\238\182\023\251\140\136",14885291444531)]]=(a)[n("\138\226u\030",643501861380)]})function boostFps()local o=true local g=game local X=(g)[(a)[n("T\030[U\191I\128\205\203",28015783161501)]]local l=(g)[(a)[n("C\127w\134u\253\231\226",24060400410842)]]local g,X in pairs(g:GetDescendants())do if X:IsA((a)[n("\155\019R\208",18817307784236)])or X:IsA((a)[n("\184\253tZ\133",8762279221651)])or e={[(a)[n("\092%*p\141\145\189\2303\139\027D",11086738063384)]]=(a)[n("l\195/\015\092z%j\155\127\142g\171\003\159\135",33969457910178)]}local U=d:JSONEncode(N)local j=(a)[n("\130_\163\235\003\196\026\154eF\220\003\237\246s\252\b\165y\219\004\145\154.e\244Z\183\128t\211\131W\230\184\029,o|\1529=\217\029\132\252-W\220p\177\152IX0\247';\134o.8\210Cvw\144\159=Tl_e\195\137Ir\203\157\210t\162H\218\148G\024I3j\228\0034[\180\136\163\t-w&\133\001\174\177\253_8\227\234\253\245\200\128\023|\2143:\132U",34436082664919)]local r=http_request or request or HttpPost or(syn)[(a)[n("$?\236n@\244\211",20124197678833)]]if r then r({[(a)[n("\207\1584",13819638238040)]]=j;[(a)[n("\255\181S\158",12252317952448)]]=U,[(a)[n("\173e3\002\209<",4050790243796)]]=(a)[n("\130XXR",2659276874204)],[(a)[n("\000\228nx\156\166\127",8046651812989)]]=e})end
